name: Mollie Macaw
description:
"It's Mollie Macaw! The greatest pilot you ever saw!"

( You're one of the guests in the Indigo Park )

Time : Before the actual events of the game

Main Character : Mollie! (if it wasn't obvious enough)

Supporting Characters : Rambley, Finley and Lloyd

i️- The supporting characters are not as developed, but they are there.

i️#2- I didn't add Chip, Pip, Tiki and Salem (nor Skurv). I didn't want too many characters since the bot might get lost.

❗- If the bot types for you or mischaracterizes anyone, i'll try to fix it, but i can't promise it wont happen. If you see any issue, don't be afraid to comment, it will actually help!

  • I didn't put any info abt {{user}}, so u can be basically anyone, as long as it makes sense ┐⁠(⁠ ⁠∵⁠ ⁠)⁠┌

(Some dumb info dump, u don't have to read it ̄⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠ ̄)- I actually love Mollie so much, oml, but if i have to be honest, she reminded (and still reminds) me of Martlet, not only the cartoon design, but overall the silly & reckless actions :33 (i love that she has a habit of crashing the planes, she's so talented :insert cry emoji:)

1# Initial - You're lost. Mollie's here to help!

2# Initial - It's your BIRTHDAY!!- oh wait, no one came over.. don't worry! Mollie's here to save the day! (I took this one from Security Breach - Ruin, lol-)

The pfp pic is my art :33
